title: Write a Jinja2 Configuration Template
description: Write a Jinja2 template for an nginx config that uses variable substitution, a default filter, and a conditional block for SSL.
starterCode:
# Write a Jinja2 template as a playbook task context
# The template content should:
# 1. Use {{ nginx_port | default(80) }} for the listen port
# 2. Use {{ ansible_hostname }} for server_name
# 3. Use {% if enable_ssl %} ... {% endif %} for conditional SSL block
# 4. Deploy with ansible.builtin.template to /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
# 5. Notify a handler called 'Reload nginx'

---
- name: Deploy nginx configuration
  hosts: webservers
  become: true
  vars:
    nginx_port: 8080
    enable_ssl: true
    ssl_cert_path: /etc/ssl/certs/server.crt
  tasks:
    - name: Deploy nginx config from template
      # Use ansible.builtin.template module
      # src: nginx.conf.j2
      # dest: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      # Add notify for 'Reload nginx'

  handlers:
    - name: Reload nginx
      # Reload (not restart) the nginx service
solutionCode:
---
- name: Deploy nginx configuration
  hosts: webservers
  become: true
  vars:
    nginx_port: 8080
    enable_ssl: true
    ssl_cert_path: /etc/ssl/certs/server.crt
  tasks:
    - name: Deploy nginx config from template
      ansible.builtin.template:
        src: nginx.conf.j2
        dest: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
        owner: root
        mode: '0644'
      notify: Reload nginx

  handlers:
    - name: Reload nginx
      ansible.builtin.service:
        name: nginx
        state: reloaded
hints: ansible.builtin.template is like copy but processes Jinja2 expressions
Use 'state: reloaded' in service handler to reload config without downtime
The src path is relative to the role's templates/ directory or playbook directory

validationRules.errorMessage: Use ansible.builtin.template to deploy the config
Add notify to trigger the handler on config change
Add a handlers section with a Reload nginx handler

simulatedOutput.success:
PLAY [Deploy nginx configuration] **********************

TASK [Gathering Facts] *********************************
ok: [web1.example.com]

TASK [Deploy nginx config from template] ***************
changed: [web1.example.com]

RUNNING HANDLER [Reload nginx] *************************
changed: [web1.example.com]

PLAY RECAP *********************************************
web1.example.com : ok=3  changed=2  unreachable=0  failed=0
